description_long: This trash bin is a rectangular, upright container with a smooth, brown exterior and a slightly domed lid. The front face features a gold triangular emblem with the word 'TIVAN' and a stylized design, adding a decorative and possibly branding element. The top of the bin has two black, arrow-like markings that may indicate the location or direction of the opening mechanism. The sides and back are plain, with no visible handles or additional markings, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a powder-coated finish for durability in outdoor urban environments. The bin is designed to be freestanding and robust, suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near public buildings.
description: A brown, rectangular trash bin with a domed lid and a gold 'TIVAN' emblem on the front, featuring black arrow markings near the top. The design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold 'TIVAN' emblem and black arrow markings near the top of the bin.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain brown surface and no visible markings or features.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, displaying the emblem and arrow markings clearly.
description_view_3: Rear view identical to view 1, plain and unmarked.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Gold triangular emblem with 'TIVAN' and a stylized design on the front; no recycling or waste type labels.
